prompt: Write an Ancient Pantry blog post on warming winter spices — which spices from TCM and Ayurveda are considered 'warming', why they matter in cold months, and how to use them. Include links to at least 4 different ingredients and 2 recipes from the site.

assertions.text: Body contains at least 6 Markdown internal links [text](/path)
Post contains at least 2 recipe links (/recipes/...)
YAML frontmatter has title, slug, tags, and meta_description
Body does not open with a # H1 heading (page template renders the title)
Post includes a FAQ section with at least 2 questions
Post does not end with a boilerplate disclaimer paragraph
YAML includes an internal_links_used audit field
Internal links use natural anchor text (e.g. [ginger] not [Ginger ingredient page])
